title: Pharmacy Technician (West/GOVT) - Entry Level/Office Hours #HAO
description:
Salary: up to $3500
Working Days & Hours: Mon-Fri office hours, alternate sat half day
Location: Kent Ridge

Job Description:
1. Pharmacy Operational duties

o Processing medication orders

o Picking, packing and labeling of medicines  in accordance to Standard Operating Procedures ( SOP)

o Perform the following medication reconciliation steps: counting, sorting and typing of prescriptions

o Perform billing functions

2. Provision of quality customer service

o Provide professional and courteous service to all patients/customers

3. Inventory Management

o Review and update inventory level base on consumption on a regular basis

o Oversee storage conditions, expiry checks, audits and reporting of defects of drug products within the institutions

o Plan and ensure that cycle counts and stock take are conducted accurately and accordingly to the Standard Operating Procedures

4. Sterile and Non-sterile Manufacturing (Laboratory & Cancer Centre Pharmacy)

o Prepare sterile and non-sterile products which include:

 Total parental nutrition bags

 IV admixtures and infusions

 Extemporaneous eye drops, cream, ointment and mixture

o Process sterile and non-sterile products prescriptions/orders:

 Assemble medication, supplies, and equipment and compound products according to set procedures.

 Ensure double-checking of all prepared products before leaving laboratory

 Ensure products manufactured by pharmacy follow quality control requirements

 Package end products including affixing of auxiliary labels

Job Requirements: Min Diploma in Pharmaceutical Science or similar

Interested candidates, please submit your resume to: allylok@recruitexpress.com.sg

Ally Audrey Lok Xin Woon

Recruit Express Pte Ltd (Healthcare & Lifescience)

Company EA Licence number : 99C4599

Personnel EA License: R21102307

allylok@recruitexpress.com.sg
